caption: A man wearing a grey wig styled in a tall crest, glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, a bow tie, and tan suspenders sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. In the background, framed photos and clothing on displays are visible, including a garment with the word "LEE" on it. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left that reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and one on the right that reads "BOSS TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, gazing slightly to the left with a serious expression. He holds his right hand up near his face, with his fingers resting against his temple and cheek. The scene remains static with only very subtle shifts in the man's posture and facial expression as he maintains his thoughtful pose.
